offense: Breach in observing obligation of Data Fiduciary to take reasonable security safeguards to prevent personal data breach under section 8(5).
penalty_amount: May extend to two hundred and fifty crore rupees
criteria: Determined by Board under section 33(2) considering nature, gravity, duration, type of data, repetition, gain/loss, mitigation, proportionality, impact.

offense: Breach in observing obligation to give the Board or affected Data Principal notice of a personal data breach under section 8(6).
penalty_amount: May extend to two hundred crore rupees

offense: Breach in observance of additional obligations in relation to children under section 9 (verifiable consent, detrimental processing, tracking/advertising).
penalty_amount: May extend to two hundred crore rupees

offense: Breach in observance of additional obligations of Significant Data Fiduciary under section 10 (appoint DPO, auditor, DPIA, audit, etc.).
penalty_amount: May extend to one hundred and fifty crore rupees

offense: Breach in observance of the duties of Data Principal under section 15.
penalty_amount: May extend to ten thousand rupees
criteria: Same as above but capped at ₹10,000.

offense: Breach of any term of voluntary undertaking accepted by the Board under section 32.
penalty_amount: Up to the extent applicable for the breach in respect of which the proceedings under section 28 were instituted.
criteria: The penalty applicable for the underlying breach.

offense: Breach of any other provision of this Act or the rules made thereunder (not covered by items 1-6).
penalty_amount: May extend to fifty crore rupees
